title: Finance & Accounting
subtitle: Operational cockpit for ERP-Lite readiness, periods, posting, and controls.

governance.title: Binding & templates
governance.body: Template application and governance assignment are managed from the platform console. Use Finance Readiness to confirm the tenant is aligned before posting.

readiness.title: Finance Readiness
readiness.description: Template status, governance assignment, and mapping gaps.

usageMaps.title: Usage maps
usageMaps.description: Map usage codes to accounts for automated posting.

periods.title: Periods
periods.description: Open and close accounting periods with prechecks.

coa.title: Chart of accounts
coa.description: Tenant account master and posting flags.

journals.title: Journal register
journals.description: List journals and open detail in GL.

reports.title: Financial reports
reports.description: Balances and statement views from posted data.

postingAudit.title: Posting audit
postingAudit.description: Posting log and journal creation history.

financeActions.title: Finance control audit
financeActions.description: Read-only log of period and control actions.

setup.title: Setup guide
setup.description: Step-by-step links through ERP-Lite go-live tasks.
